tracks.rawText: 4:14Michael Jackson - Billie Jeanv5.5CoverOrchestral rock anthem with cinematic production, Features a prominent grand piano playing a repetitive eighth-note ostinato in the mid-range, A baritone male vocal delivers a dramatic performance, transitioning from a breathy chest voice to a powerful, belted head voice in the chorus, The arrangement builds with a staccato string section and deep, resonant orchestral percussion including timpani and concert bass drum, Distorted electric guitars enter during the chorus with sustained power chords and a thick, saturated tone, A soaring legato string ensemble provides melodic counterpoint in the higher register, The track is in the key of D minor with a tempo of 76 BPM in 4/4 time, The production uses heavy hall reverb on the vocals and drums to create a vast spatial image1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Michael Jackson - Billie Jean
